ready_leads.why: Longmont Arts Week Festival: Annual events featuring art exhibits, live music performances throughout downtown Longmont. Suggested next step: Details about this year's festival, including dates of events, list artists or bands performing to check if any are known. What would make this publishable: Details about the festival's events and artists/ bands performing will make this lead publishable.

linked_evidence.excerpt:
Discover all the departments that make up the City of Longmont’s government. Get detailed information on their roles, responsibilities, and how they serve the community.
All Departments
Government
Home
City Clerk
Agenda Management Portal
Agenda Management Portal
More in City Clerk
Agenda Management Portal    Business License    Colorado Revised Statutes    Election Information    Campaign Finance Reporting Dashboard (Beta)    Candidate Information - How to run for City Council    Fair Campaign Practices and Required Reporting    Initiative, Referendum and Recall    Past Election Results    Voter Registration Information      Licenses and Permits    Animal Licenses    Fishing Permits    Liquor License Application Forms    Liquor Licenses    Marijuana Licenses    Special Events Permit    Specialty Business Licenses      Longmont Municipal Code    Transparency, Public Records and Open Records Requests
Welcome to the new Public Meeting Portal
All agendas and meeting packets of the Longmont City Council and the City’s advisory boards are published to this portal to make it easier for residents to find information about upcoming meetings and topics.
Not all meetings listed here are livestreamed. Generally, City Council and Planning & Zoning Commission meetings are livestreamed, but not all of them are.  Look for the words “(livestreamed)” after the meeting title.
Most advisory board meetings are recorded and uploaded to the City’s YouTube channel a few days after the meeting (youtube.com/@cityoflongmont).
Search for past topics by using the Search and Advanced Search functions.
The portal page works best in Google Chrome.  Some users may not see the page fully load if using Internet Explorer.   Click to view this page in a separate window .

generic_hits.why: Council Vote on Roof Contract for Public Library: The council agenda includes an upcoming vote to approve a contract with Silver City Roofing and Construction Co., Inc. This approval affects city spending, construction timeline of the public library, which is crucial as it provides services affecting thousands in Longmont. Editor context: Important decision impacting local government budget allocation for infrastructure projects; high civic interest due to direct community service impact. Suggested next step: Review the agenda packet, confirm vendor details and contract amount, verify vote date on council meeting notes before drafting a story.
